title: T-005 — Drizzle schema: wo_outputs + wo_dependencies + wo_status_history
prompt:
Add Drizzle pgTable definitions for `wo_outputs`, `wo_dependencies`, `wo_status_history` per PRD §5.8 + §5.9 + §5.11. wo_outputs: id, tenant_id, wo_id FK, product_id FK, output_role enum ('primary'|'co_product'|'byproduct'), planned_qty, uom, actual_qty, allocation_pct DECIMAL(5,2), disposition enum ('to_stock'|'direct_continue'|'pending_decision'), downstream_wo_id FK NULL, output_lp_id NULL, notes. Add partial unique index ensuring one primary per WO. wo_dependencies: id, tenant_id, parent_wo_id FK, child_wo_id FK, material_link FK (wo_materials), required_qty, created_at. UNIQUE(tenant_id, parent_wo_id, child_wo_id). wo_status_history: wo_id, from_status, to_status, action, user_id, override_reason TEXT, timestamp, context_jsonb.

Generate migration `0005_planning_wo_outputs_dag.sql`. RED test asserts partial-unique primary constraint and UNIQUE on dependencies.

pipeline_inputs.description: Schema for wo_outputs (primary/co/byproduct), wo_dependencies (DAG edges), wo_status_history.
pipeline_inputs.details: Cycle prevention is service-layer (DFS topo sort) — DB only enforces UNIQUE(tenant_id, parent_wo_id, child_wo_id) per §5.9. Partial unique index `wo_outputs_one_primary_per_wo` on (tenant_id, wo_id) WHERE output_role='primary'. allocation_pct sum check = 100% deferred to service layer (V-PLAN-WO-004 — warn, not block by default). disposition default 'to_stock' (per §14.1, P1 enforces only to_stock).
acceptance_criteria: Given the schema loads, when introspected, then all 3 tables export expected columns including the 3 enums.
Given the migration is generated, when grepped, then partial-unique on (tenant_id, wo_id) WHERE output_role='primary' exists.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/wo_outputs_dag.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
Given `pnpm tsc --noEmit`, when run, then no errors.
test_strategy: RED test asserts presence of partial-unique primary index + UNIQUE dependency edge constraint.
risk_red_lines: Do not enforce cycle-free at DB layer — performance-prohibitive on insert.
Do not delete wo_status_history rows on WO delete — history is permanent.
